name: tech-pulse
description: Tech Pulse — IT Industry & Cloud News Aggregator Dashboard powered by MCP

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "MCP,API,WEB" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan,green" "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd server && node-env-run node index.js || node index.js
scripts.build:server: cd mcp-server && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
